title: prangos latiloba
intro: Prangos latiloba, also known as Ferula latiloba or Prangos ferulacea, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots which are rich in compounds such as ferulic acid, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prangos latiloba include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and essential oils, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
